glosses.ja: 目に見える; 可視的な

sentences.target: La tache est visible sur ta chemise.
sentences.reading: /la taʃ ɛ vizibl syʁ ta ʃəmiz/

translations.fr: La tache est visible sur ta chemise.
translations.ipa: /la taʃ ɛ vizibl syʁ ta ʃəmiz/
translations.en: The stain is visible on your shirt.
translations.es: La mancha se ve en tu camisa.
translations.de: Der Fleck ist auf deinem Hemd sichtbar.
translations.it: La macchia è visibile sulla tua camicia.
translations.zh-Hans: 你衬衫上的污渍看得见。
translations.yue: 你件衫上面個污漬睇得見。
translations.pt: A mancha está visível na sua camisa.
translations.vi: Có thể thấy vết bẩn trên áo sơ mi của bạn.
translations.nl: De vlek is zichtbaar op je shirt.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी कमीज़ पर दाग दिखाई दे रहा है.
translations.pl: Plama jest widoczna na twojej koszuli.
translations.el: Ο λεκές φαίνεται στο πουκάμισό σου.
translations.nb: Flekken er synlig på skjorten din.
translations.ro: Pata este vizibilă pe cămașa ta.
translations.cs: Skvrna je viditelná na tvé košili.
translations.da: Pletten er synlig på din skjorte.
translations.ja: あなたのシャツにシミが見える。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with the head noun.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
3rd person singular present of être; copular auxiliary linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective describing the subject via the copula.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
2nd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying the noun.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: La lune est visible ce soir.

translations.fr: La lune est visible ce soir.
translations.es: La luna se ve esta noche.
translations.de: Der Mond ist heute Abend sichtbar.
translations.pt: A lua está visível esta noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay có thể nhìn thấy mặt trăng.
translations.hi: आज रात चाँद दिखाई दे रहा है.
translations.ro: Luna este vizibilă în această seară.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with the head noun.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
3rd person singular present of être; copular auxiliary.
Predicate adjective with the copula.
Demonstrative determiner marking a specific time expression.
Common noun, masculine; complements the temporal expression 'ce soir' (tonight).

sentences.target: Ton code n'est pas visible sur l'écran.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ kɔd nɛ pa vizibl syʁ lekʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ton code n'est pas visible sur l'écran.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ kɔd nɛ pa vizibl syʁ lekʁɑ̃/
translations.en: Your code isn’t visible on the screen.
translations.es: Tu código no se ve en la pantalla.
translations.de: Dein Code ist auf dem Bildschirm nicht sichtbar.
translations.it: Il tuo codice non è visibile sullo schermo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的代码在屏幕上看不见。
translations.yue: 你嘅代碼喺個畫面上睇唔到。
translations.ru: Твой код не видно на экране.
translations.pt: Seu código não está visível na tela.
translations.he: הקוד שלך לא נראה על המסך.
translations.vi: Mã của bạn không hiển thị trên màn hình.
translations.nl: Je code is niet zichtbaar op het scherm.
translations.uk: Твій код не видно на екрані.
translations.hu: A kódod nem látszik a képernyőn.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा कोड स्क्रीन पर दिखाई नहीं दे रहा है.
translations.pl: Twój kod nie jest widoczny na ekranie.
translations.el: Ο κωδικός σου δεν είναι ορατός στην οθόνη.
translations.nb: Koden din er ikke synlig på skjermen.
translations.id: Kode kamu tidak terlihat di layar.
translations.sv: Din kod syns inte på skärmen.
translations.ro: Codul tău nu este vizibil pe ecran.
translations.cs: Tvůj kód není na obrazovce viditelný.
translations.da: Din kode er ikke synlig på skærmen.
translations.ja: あなたのコードは画面に表示されていない。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying the noun.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
Clitic negation 'n'' (from 'ne') attached to 'est'; 3rd person singular present of être serving as copula within negation.
Negative adverb completing the discontinuous negation 'ne … pas'.
Predicate adjective with the copula.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; head of NP with elided definite article 'l'' (from 'le') attached.

sentences.target: Je veux rendre mon profil visible.

translations.fr: Je veux rendre mon profil visible.
translations.en: I want to make my profile visible.
translations.es: Quiero que mi perfil sea visible.
translations.de: Ich möchte mein Profil sichtbar machen.
translations.it: Voglio rendere visibile il mio profilo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想让我的个人资料可见。
translations.yue: 我想將我嘅個人資料設為可見。
translations.ru: Я хочу сделать свой профиль видимым.
translations.he: אני רוצה להפוך את הפרופיל שלי לגלוי.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn làm hồ sơ của mình hiển thị.
translations.nl: Ik wil mijn profiel zichtbaar maken.
translations.uk: Я хочу зробити свій профіль видимим.
translations.hi: मैं अपना प्रोफ़ाइल दृश्यमान बनाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę, aby mój profil był widoczny.
translations.el: Θέλω να κάνω το προφίλ μου ορατό.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjøre profilen min synlig.
translations.id: Saya ingin membuat profil saya terlihat.
translations.sv: Jag vill göra min profil synlig.
translations.ro: Vreau să fac profilul meu vizibil.
translations.cs: Chci, aby můj profil byl viditelný.
translations.da: Jeg vil gøre min profil synlig.
translations.ja: 自分のプロフィールを公開したい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present of vouloir; main verb selecting an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb meaning 'to make/render', complement of 'veux'.
1st person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying the noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'rendre'.
Object complement (resultative adjective) indicating the resulting state after 'rendre'.
